syntax_notes: IOS-XE router syntax; configuration commands largely match classic IOS.
platform_warnings: Throughput and some features vary by platform entitlement, IOS-XE image and release.

feature_warnings.etherchannel: Port-channels are supported only in specific designs; verify before use.
feature_warnings.layer2: Switchport commands require an NIM/SM switch module; onboard ports are routed only.
feature_warnings.svi: SVIs require a switch module or virtual platform support.
feature_warnings.dmvpn: Requires the securityk9 license entitlement on this platform; verify with 'show license' / Smart Licensing before use.
feature_warnings.ipsec: Requires the securityk9 license entitlement on this platform; verify with 'show license' / Smart Licensing before use.
feature_warnings.zbf: Requires the securityk9 license entitlement on this platform; verify with 'show license' / Smart Licensing before use.
